channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Bald eagle Jackie rescued near Big Bear after ground fight with sub-adults
item.description: A bald eagle believed to be Jackie, one-half of the iconic Big Bear nest livestream pair, was rescued near Big Bear Lake after being found on the ground in a fight with two sub-adult eagles. The adult...

item.title: Iran Targets U.S. Military in Kuwait Amid Escalating West Asia Conflict

item.title: Nairobi Security Guards Ask Patrons for Money, Kenyans React

item.title: CRDB Bank Supports Youth Football Development Through Imbeju Academy

item.title: Argentina's World Cup final defeat highlights Messi's legacy and team's decline
item.description: Lionel Messi's farewell World Cup final ended in disappointment as Argentina's performance faltered against Spain. The match, held at New York New Jersey Stadium, saw Argentina fail to score in regula...

item.title: One Nation's Exploitation of Public Sentiment: A Modern Spiritualist Scam

item.description: Pali Lehohla's article critiques the South African Institute of Race Relations (IEC) for failing to address systemic economic inequality and democratic erosion. Using census data, he highlights how we...

item.title: BDO's initiative helps renters transition to homeownership through affordable mortgage programs

item.title: Rodri Crowned World Cup 2026 Player of the Tournament as Spain Sweep Individual Awards
item.description: Spain's captain, Rodri, has been named the best player of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after leading his team to victory. The 30-year-old midfielder from Manchester City broke records with 94% pass complet...

item.title: Enugu State Launches Task Force to Tackle Medical Quackery

item.title: Coles Abandons $4 Billion Pet Business Acquisition Due to Valuation Concerns
item.description: Coles has abandoned its $4 billion bid to acquire Greencross, the owner of Petbarn and City Farmer, citing concerns over the valuation. The decision comes after shareholder pressure to preserve capita...

item.title: Ukraine-Russia Conflict Escalates with Major Missile Attacks and Oil Infrastructure Strikes
item.description: Ukrainian forces have struck three oil depots and a fuel facility in Russia's southern Stavropol region, according to President Volodymyr Zelensky. The attack follows a major Russian aerial assault on...

item.title: Nairobi Woman Builds Pizza Empire After Leaving Bank Job, Mother Now Supports Her Venture
item.description: A Nairobi woman left a stable bank job to start a pizza business, a decision that left her mother deeply unconvinced at the time. Nine years after launching Crafted Pizza, the business now runs severa...

item.title: Kylian Mbappe Becomes World Cup's Top Scorer with Second Golden Boot Win
item.description: Kylian Mbappe has cemented his legacy as the all-time leading scorer in FIFA World Cup history after claiming his second Golden Boot title. The 27-year-old French forward scored 10 goals in the 2026 t...

item.title: Manitoba search continues for two missing boys after rapids incident
item.description: Two boys aged 10 and 13 went missing after being swept into fast-moving rapids at Nutimik Lake in Manitoba’s Whiteshell Provincial Park on Saturday, July 19, 2026. RCMP launched a comprehensive water,...
